scripts.build: npm run build:cdk && npm run build:cloudfront
scripts.lambda:install-deps: pip install -r lambdas/endpoints/requirements.txt -t lambdas/endpoints/dependencies --upgrade --platform manylinux2014_aarch64 --implementation cp --python-version 3.13 --only-binary=:all:
scripts.deploy:frontend-build: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.deploy:worker:versioned: npm run build && cdk deploy worker --require-approval never
scripts.deploy: mkdir -p frontend/build && npm run lambda:install-deps && npm run deploy:storage && npm run deploy:auth && npm run deploy:worker && npm run deploy:lambdas && npm run deploy:api && npm run config:write && npm run dcv:download && cd frontend && npm install && cd .. && npm run deploy:frontend-build && npm run deploy:frontend
